overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a gothic horror game showing a character in a long coat and tricorn hat ascending stone stairs and walking along a foggy, lamp-lit promenade at night. The atmosphere is heavily atmospheric with Victorian-era architecture, wet cobblestones, and thick fog limiting visibility.

events.description: character reaches top of stairs and transitions to flat paved surface

agents.ego_description: climbing wide stone stairs toward an elevated walkway, long coat flowing behind

entered.detail: wide wet stone stairs with dark worn surfaces
tall stone retaining wall with decorative pillars
black iron fence running along the left side
large historic building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by a high stone wall on the left and open air on the right. The environment is dark and foggy with a massive gothic building visible in the background, its windows glowing warmly through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy riverside promenade with historic street lamps

events.description: distant human figure becomes visible through the fog ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy promenade toward a distant figure visible through the mist

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing or walking slowly ahead on the cobblestone path

entered.detail: tall ornate iron street lamp casting warm orange light through the fog
silhouettes of tall gothic towers and buildings barely visible in heavy fog

segments.scene_description: Walking along a foggy cobblestone promenade lined with iron railings on the left and massive gothic architecture on the right. Street lamps pierce through the heavy fog illuminating the wet ground, while the silhouettes of distant towers loom ahead. A lone figure becomes visible in the distance as the character continues forward through the atmospheric night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a steep ascent up stone stairs into a walk along a desolate, lamp-lit gothic promenade. It begins with the character climbing a wide staircase flanked by a high stone wall, while a massive gothic building glows warmly through the dense background mist. As the character reaches the top, the scene opens onto a wet cobblestone walkway lined with iron railings and towering architecture. The camera then pushes forward through the heavy fog, where street lamps pierce the gloom to illuminate the glistening ground and the silhouettes of distant towers. Finally, the perspective extends further down the atmospheric path as a lone figure emerges in the distance.
